---
title: "PolyU Brand Preview"
subtitle: "Revealjs Template"
author: "Fangran MIAO"
institute:
  - "Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence"
  - "The Hong Kong Polytechnic University"
  - "Joint work with"
brand: _extensions/polyu/brand.yml
format:
  polyu-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    footer: "The Hong Kong Polytechnic University"
    incremental: true
    transition: fade
---

# Part 1

## Introduction

This slide is for checking whether the PolyU brand settings are applied correctly.

- Heading color should follow `PolyU Red`
- Body text should stay clean and readable
- Links should inherit the brand accent, such as [PolyU Brand Assets](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/cpa/brand-assets/){target="_blank"}

## Typography Check

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

`Monospace text` should still be easy to distinguish in technical slides.

## Content Slide

### Key Messages

- Brand color should feel stable and academic
- Secondary text should align with `PolyU Grey`
- The overall look should remain simple and production-friendly

## Code Block

```python
def polyu_score(impact: float, quality: float, innovation: float) -> float:
    """Simple weighted score for demo purposes."""
    return 0.4 * impact + 0.4 * quality + 0.2 * innovation


print(round(polyu_score(88, 92, 90), 2))
```

## Table And Callout

| Element | Expected Brand Effect |
|---|---|
| Heading | PolyU Red |
| Main text | Dark neutral |
| Secondary accents | PolyU Grey |
| Links | Brand primary |

::: {.callout-note}
This callout helps us check how container components look under the current brand settings.
:::

## Closing

If this page looks close to the official PolyU identity, the `brand.yml` is working as intended.
